entries.title: API versioning and developer compatibility
entries.summary: Added API v1 aliases, request IDs, consistent error metadata, SDK v1 defaults, and developer compatibility documentation.
major_changes: Added /api/version and /api/v1 route aliases without removing existing /api routes.
Added X-Request-ID, X-Vorliq-API-Version, and X-Vorliq-API-Stability response headers.
Updated the JavaScript SDK to default to API v1 while supporting legacy mode.
compatibility_notes: Structured errors include a top-level message during the transition.

entries.title: Community identity verification and moderation tools
entries.summary: Added wallet-control profile verification, non-KYC trust labels, public reports, and protected moderation queues.
major_changes: Wallet verification proves control of a Vorliq wallet only.
Reports create a moderation review queue and do not automatically delete content.
Forum and chat moderation controls avoid exposing private data.
compatibility_notes: Profile labels are factual community signals, not legal identity verification.
Existing public profile and forum APIs remain available.

entries.title: Wallet and transaction safety v2
entries.summary: Added safer address validation, send review steps, duplicate-send protection, pending-status clarity, and wallet backup education.
major_changes: Web and mobile send flows show review and irreversible transaction warnings.
Backend validation rejects invalid amounts, same sender and receiver, and unsafe public sender addresses.
compatibility_notes: Wallet signing material remains local and is never sent to the backend.

entries.title: Official 1.0 release
entries.summary: Delivered the full Vorliq platform with blockchain, web app, backend API, mobile app, lending, exchange, governance, peer networking, monitoring, tests, and documentation.
major_changes: Independent proof-of-work VLQ blockchain with SECP256K1 wallets and signed transactions.
React web app, Node backend API, and React Native Expo mobile app.
Community lending, exchange, governance, treasury, registry, diagnostics, and public documentation.
compatibility_notes: Vorliq is community savings bank software built on its own blockchain with the VLQ coin.
VLQ has no guaranteed market value and should not be represented as an investment promise.
